mapper.select: SELECT auth_grp_seq ,auth_grp_cd ,auth_grp_nm ,auth_grp_desc ,auth_grp_type_cd ,use_flag ,rgst_user_id ,rgst_date_time ,upt_user_id ,upt_date_time FROM tb_auth_grp ORDER BY auth_grp_seq

SELECT tagr.auth_grp_role_seq ,tagr.auth_grp_seq ,tagr.role_seq ,tr.role_cd ,tr.role_nm ,tagr.str_date ,tagr.end_date ,tagr.use_flag ,tagr.rgst_user_id ,tagr.rgst_date_time ,tagr.upt_user_id ,tagr.upt_date_time FROM tb_auth_grp_role tagr INNER JOIN tb_auth_grp tag ON tagr.auth_grp_seq = tag.auth_grp_seq INNER JOIN tb_role tr ON tagr.role_seq = tr.role_seq WHERE 1=1 AND tagr.auth_grp_seq = #{authGrpSeq} ORDER BY tagr.auth_grp_role_seq

SELECT tagm.auth_grp_menu_seq ,tagm.auth_grp_seq ,tm.menu_seq ,tm.menu_nm ,tagm.use_flag ,tm.menu_seq AS menu_id ,tm.up_menu_seq AS up_menu_id ,tm.menu_type_cd ,tagm.rgst_user_id FROM tb_menu tm LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_auth_grp_menu tagm ON tm.menu_seq = tagm.menu_seq AND tagm.auth_grp_seq = #{authGrpSeq} LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_auth_grp tag ON tagm.auth_grp_seq = tag.auth_grp_seq WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY tagm.auth_grp_menu_seq

SELECT tag.auth_grp_seq ,tag.auth_grp_cd ,tag.auth_grp_nm ,tag.auth_grp_desc ,tag.use_flag FROM tb_auth_grp tag INNER JOIN tb_auth_grp_role tagr ON tag.auth_grp_seq = tagr.auth_grp_seq AND tagr.use_flag = true AND now() BETWEEN tagr.str_date AND COALESCE(tagr.end_date, '2999-12-31') INNER JOIN tb_role tr ON tr.role_seq = tagr.role_seq AND tr.use_flag =true INNER JOIN tb_role_user tru ON tr.role_seq = tru.role_seq AND tru.use_flag =true AND now() BETWEEN tru.str_date AND COALESCE(tru.end_date, '2999-12-31') INNER JOIN tb_user tu ON tu.user_seq = tru.user_seq AND tu.use_flag =true WHERE tu.user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY tag.auth_grp_seq

SELECT tag.auth_grp_seq ,tagm.menu_seq ,tm.menu_seq AS menu_id ,tm.up_menu_seq AS up_menu_id ,tm.menu_nm ,tm.menu_type_cd ,tagm.use_flag FROM tb_auth_grp tag LEFT JOIN tb_auth_grp_menu tagm ON tag.auth_grp_seq = tagm.auth_grp_seq LEFT JOIN tb_menu tm ON tagm.menu_seq = tm.menu_seq WHERE tag.use_flag = true AND tag.auth_grp_seq = #{authGrpSeq} ORDER BY tag.auth_grp_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_auth_grp_menu ( auth_grp_seq ,menu_seq ,use_flag ,rgst_user_id ,rgst_date_time ,upt_user_id ,upt_date_time ) SELECT #{authGrpSeq} , tm.menu_seq , false ,#{rgstUserId} ,now() ,#{uptUserId} ,now() FROM tb_menu tm
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_auth_grp WHERE auth_grp_cd=#{authGrpCd}
